# openwrt_system_timeserver (Resource)

NTP client and server configuration.



<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Optional

- `enable_server` (Boolean) Enable the local NTP server, making this device available as an NTP source for other hosts.
- `enabled` (Boolean) Enable the NTP client.
- `id` (String) Name of the section. This name is only used when interacting with UCI directly.
- `server` (List of String) List of NTP server hostnames or addresses.
